signature: AssertionError: expected status 201 got 500 @ POST /products response missing required field id schema violation serializer error
root_cause: Serializer dropped the id field after a model refactor

signature: AssertionError: expected price 19.99 got 19.90 @ POST /carts checkout total rounding off by one cent
root_cause: Rounding changed from HALF_UP to FLOOR in price calc

signature: AssertionError: expected 20 items got 19 @ GET /products?page=2 pagination off-by-one missing last item
root_cause: Off-by-one in LIMIT/OFFSET pagination after query refactor

signature: AssertionError: expected status 204 got 200 @ DELETE /products/{id} wrong success status code contract violation
root_cause: Endpoint returned 200 instead of documented 204 No Content

signature: AssertionError: expected field total to be number got string @ GET /invoices/{id} type mismatch schema violation
root_cause: total serialized as string after currency-format change

signature: AssertionError: expected 200 got 422 @ POST /users validation rejects valid email regression in validator
root_cause: Email validation regex tightened incorrectly

signature: AssertionError: expected non-null token got null @ POST /users/login auth response missing access_token field
root_cause: Login response omitted access_token after auth refactor

signature: AssertionError: expected category name Tools got null @ GET /categories/{id} required field name missing schema violation
root_cause: Eager-load dropped category name in response

signature: ConnectionError: Failed to establish a new connection Name or service not known @ GET /products DNS resolution failed for api host
root_cause: DNS could not resolve API host in CI network
fix_ref: added DNS readiness check; config change

signature: HTTPError: 502 Bad Gateway @ GET /products upstream proxy returned bad gateway service not ready
root_cause: Reverse proxy started before API container was healthy

signature: HTTPError: 401 Unauthorized @ GET /invoices missing or expired bearer token environment auth not configured
root_cause: API_TOKEN env var not set in CI job
fix_ref: added API_TOKEN secret to CI; config change

signature: SSLError: certificate verify failed self signed certificate @ GET /products TLS handshake failed in staging env
root_cause: Staging used a self-signed cert not in the CI trust store

signature: OperationalError: too many connections @ POST /products database connection pool exhausted under parallel CI
root_cause: DB max_connections too low for parallel CI workers

signature: ConnectionRefusedError: Connection refused @ GET /cart redis cache dependency unavailable in runner
root_cause: Redis sidecar not started before suite ran

signature: KeyError: API_BASE_URL @ suite setup required environment variable not set configuration error
root_cause: Missing API_BASE_URL env var in CI matrix entry
fix_ref: added env to CI matrix; config change

signature: AssertionError: expected order count 5 got 4 @ GET /orders flaky depends on timezone date boundary off by one day
root_cause: TZD: Timezone-dependent — date boundary differs by runner timezone

signature: AssertionError: expected greeting Good morning got Good evening @ GET /banner flaky depends on time of day clock
root_cause: TD: Time-dependent — assertion tied to wall-clock time of day

signature: AssertionError: expected first result A got B @ GET /products?sort=relevance non-deterministic ordering from hash seed randomization
root_cause: NOD: Non-deterministic — tie-break order varies with PYTHONHASHSEED

signature: TimeoutError: read timed out @ POST /payments flaky intermittent network jitter retry succeeded on rerun
root_cause: NOD: Non-deterministic — transient network latency to payment gateway
fix_ref: added retry with backoff in client

signature: AssertionError: duplicate cart created @ POST /carts race condition double submit flaky under concurrency
root_cause: NOD: Non-deterministic — race between two concurrent cart creates

signature: AssertionError: expected 200 got 404 @ GET /products/{id}/image brittle test depends on a product seeded by an earlier test order dependent
root_cause: OD-Brit: Order-dependent brittle — relies on seed data from a prior test
